# MCP reference

## Tool: help

Print the manifest-derived list of verbs as JSON; intended for SessionStart / SessionEnd reason=compact hooks.

### Input schema

- (no input fields)

### Output schema

- `verbs`: type=[]VerbSummary — Array of {name, description} for every verb in the manifest.

### Errors

- (none)
